title: Teradyne, Inc. (TER) CEO Mark Jagiela on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 27, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Andrew Blanchard - VP, Corporate Relations Mark Jagiela - President, CEO & Director Sanjay Mehta - CFO, VP & Treasurer Conference Call Participants Christopher Muse - Evercore ISI Mehdi Hosseini - Susquehanna Financial Group Timothy Arcuri - UBS Brian Chin - Stifel, Nicolaus & Company Atif Malik - Citigroup Vivek Arya - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Krish Sankar - Cowen and Company Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs Group Joseph Moore - Morgan Stanley Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Q1 2022 Teradyne, Inc. Earnings Conference Call.

title: Teradyne (TER) Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Down Y/Y
text: Teradyne's (TER) first-quarter 2022 results reflect weak demand for Test products. Yet, strength of the IA business aids the quarterly performance.

title: Teradyne Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: NORTH READING, Mass., April 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) reported revenue of $755 million for the first quarter of 2022 of which $482 million was in Semiconductor Test, $119 million in System Test, $52 million in Wireless Test and $103 million in Industrial Automation (IA). GAAP net income for the first quarter was $161.9 million, or $0.92 per diluted share. On a non-GAAP basis, Teradyne's net income in the first quarter was $169.0 million, or $0.98 per diluted share, which excluded restructuring and other charges, acquired intangible asset amortization, and included the related tax impact on non-GAAP adjustments.

title: Teradyne to Announce First Quarter 2022 Results
text: NORTH READING, Mass., April 15, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) will release financial results for the first quarter of 2022 on Tuesday, April 26, 2022 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (ET) or later.

title: 3 Dividend-Paying Tech Stocks to Buy in April

title: 10 Robotics Stocks to Buy for 2022 and Beyond
text: The most popular stocks for a robotics-based portfolio are IRBT, ISRG, and NVDA. These picks offer massive potential in this new area.
